steps.title: Identify the limiting condition
steps.content: The underlined portion explains that certain characteristics “tend not to fossilize.” The immediately following “so” signals cause-and-effect: this limitation prompted paleontologists to adopt an alternative approach.

steps.title: Match the reason to the choices
steps.content: Choice D expresses the function: the underlined portion “indicates why paleontologists have used another approach in addition to fossil analysis.” The other choices either invert the reasoning, invent absent disputes, or claim misidentification the text doesn't describe. This matches choice D — D is correct.
